en: These are the sons of David who were born to him in Hebron: the firstborn, Amnon, by Ahinoam the Jezreelite; the second, Daniel, by Abigail the Carmelite,
zh: 大衛在希伯崙所生的兒子是：長子暗嫩，是耶斯列人亞希暖生的；次子但以利，是迦密人亞比該生的；

en: the third, Absalom, whose mother was Maacah, the daughter of Talmai, king of Geshur; the fourth, Adonijah, whose mother was Haggith;
zh: 三子押沙龍，是基述王達買的女兒瑪迦生的；四子亞多尼雅，是哈及的兒子；

en: the fifth, Shephatiah, by Abital; the sixth, Ithream, by his wife Eglah;
zh: 五子示法提雅，是亞比他生的；六子以特念，是大衛的妻子以格拉生的。

en: six were born to him in Hebron, where he reigned for seven years and six months. And he reigned thirty-three years in Jerusalem.
zh: 這六個兒子是大衛在希伯崙生的；大衛在希伯崙作王七年六個月；在耶路撒冷作王三十三年。

en: These were born to him in Jerusalem: Shimea, Shobab, Nathan and Solomon, four by Bath-shua, the daughter of Ammiel;
zh: 大衛在耶路撒冷所生的兒子是：示米亞、朔罷、拿單、所羅門，這四個兒子是亞米利的女兒拔．書亞生的。

en: then Ibhar, Elishama, Eliphelet,
zh: 還有益轄、以利沙瑪、以利法列、

en: Nogah, Nepheg, Japhia,
zh: 挪迦、尼斐、雅非亞、

en: Elishama, Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.
zh: 以利沙瑪、以利雅大、以利法列等九人。

en: All these were David's sons, besides the sons of the concubines, and Tamar was their sister.
zh: 他們都是大衛的兒子，此外還有他們的妹妹他瑪，以及妃嬪所生的兒子。

en: The son of Solomon was Rehoboam, Abijah his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son,
zh: 所羅門的兒子是羅波安，羅波安的兒子是亞比雅，亞比雅的兒子是亞撒，亞撒的兒子是約沙法，

en: Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son,
zh: 約沙法的兒子是約蘭，約蘭的兒子是亞哈謝，亞哈謝的兒子是約阿施，

en: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son,
zh: 約阿施的兒子是亞瑪謝，亞瑪謝的兒子是亞撒利雅，亞撒利雅的兒子是約坦，

en: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son,
zh: 約坦的兒子是亞哈斯，亞哈斯的兒子是希西家，希西家的兒子是瑪拿西，

en: Amon his son, Josiah his son.
zh: 瑪拿西的兒子是亞們，亞們的兒子是約西亞。

en: The sons of Josiah: Johanan the firstborn, the second Jehoiakim, the third Zedekiah, the fourth Shallum.
zh: 約西亞的兒子是：長子約哈難、次子約雅敬、三子西底家、四子沙龍。

en: The descendants of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son;
zh: 約雅敬的兒子是耶哥尼雅和西底家。

en: and the sons of Jeconiah, the captive: Shealtiel his son,
zh: 被擄的耶哥尼雅的兒子是撒拉鐵、

en: Malchiram, Pedaiah, Shenazzar, Jekamiah, Hosh-ama and Nedabiah;
zh: 瑪基蘭、毘大雅、示拿薩、耶加米、何沙瑪和尼大比雅。

en: and the sons of Pedaiah: Zerubbabel and Shimei; and the sons of Zerubbabel: Meshullam and Hananiah, and Shelomith was their sister;
zh: 毘大雅的兒子是所羅巴伯和示每；所羅巴伯的兒子是米書蘭和哈拿尼雅，還有他們的妹妹示羅密。

en: and Hashubah, Ohel, Berechiah, Hasadiah, and Jushab-hesed, five.
zh: 又有哈舒巴、阿黑、比利家、哈撒底、于沙．希悉等五人。

en: The sons of Hananiah: Pelatiah and Jeshaiah, his son Rephaiah, his son Arnan, his son Obadiah, his son Shecaniah.
zh: 哈拿尼雅的兒子是毘拉提和耶篩亞；還有利法雅的眾子、亞珥難的眾子、俄巴底亞的眾子和示迦尼的眾子。

en: The son of Shecaniah: Shemaiah. And the sons of Shemaiah: Hattush, Igal, Bariah, Neariah, and Shaphat, six.
zh: 示迦尼的子孫如下：示迦尼的兒子是示瑪雅；示瑪雅的兒子是哈突、以甲、巴利亞、尼利雅、沙法共六人。

en: The sons of Neariah: Elioenai, Hizkiah, and Azrikam, three.
zh: 尼利雅的兒子是以利約乃、希西家、亞斯利干共三人。

en: The sons of Elioenai: Hodaviah, Eliashib, Pelaiah, Akkub, Johanan, Delaiah, and Anani, seven.
zh: 以利約乃的兒子是何大雅、以利雅實、毘萊雅、阿谷、約哈難、第來雅、阿拿尼共七人。
